title: UnsubscribeDecision
description: Structured output produced by the unsubscribe_borderline prompt (plan §14 Phase 5). The recommender pipeline calls the LLM only on senders that hit 2-of-3 rule criteria; this schema mirrors the Pydantic UnsubscribeDecision in app.llm.schemas so a hallucinated field surfaces as a 422 at the ingestion boundary. Confidence is capped at 0.95 by contract — the prompt instructions forbid exceeding that ceiling.

should_recommend.description: Final verdict: true when the recommender should surface this sender for unsubscribe.

confidence.description: Calibrated probability the decision is correct. Values at or below 0.8 never auto-act (plan §7 policy gate). The prompt caps this at 0.95.

category.description: Dominant sender archetype — drives the UI badge color.

rationale.description: One-sentence explanation citing the specific aggregate signals. Encrypted at rest.
